ddls:
CREATE TABLE "movies" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each movie */,
  "title" TEXT /* Title of the movie */,
  "overview" TEXT /* Overview or summary of the movie */,
  "release_date" TEXT /* Date the movie was released */,
  "budget" INTEGER /* Budget of the movie */,
  "revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie */,
  "runtime" INTEGER /* Runtime of the movie in minutes */,
  "vote_average" REAL /* Average rating of the movie */,
  "vote_count" INTEGER /* Number of votes the movie has received */,
  "poster_path" TEXT /* File path to the movie poster */,
  "tagline" TEXT /* Tagline of the movie */,
  "homepage" TEXT /* Homepage URL of the movie */,
  "imdb_id" TEXT /* IMDB ID of the movie */,
  "is_adult" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie is adult content */,
  "original_language" TEXT /* Original language of the movie */,
  "original_title" TEXT /* Original title of the movie */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the movie (e.g., released, upcoming) */,
  "video" INTEGER /* Indicates if the movie has a video */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "genres" (
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each genre */,
  "genre_name" TEXT /* Name of the genre */,
  "genre_description" TEXT /* Description of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_genres" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "genre_id" INTEGER /* ID of the genre */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "genre_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "keywords" (
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each keyword */,
  "keyword_name" TEXT /* Name of the keyword */,
  "keyword_description" TEXT /* Description of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_keywords" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "keyword_id" INTEGER /* ID of the keyword */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "keyword_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "cast_members" (
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each cast member */,
  "cast_name" TEXT /* Name of the cast member */,
  "cast_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the cast member */,
  "cast_birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the cast member */,
  "cast_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the cast member */,
  "cast_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the cast member */,
  "cast_place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the cast member */,
  "cast_profile_path" TEXT /* File path to the cast member's profile picture */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_cast" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "cast_id" INTEGER /* ID of the cast member */,
  "character_name" TEXT /* Name of the character played by the cast member */,
  "order" INTEGER /* Order of the cast member in the movie credits */,
  "cast_credit_id" TEXT /* Credit ID of the cast member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "cast_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "crew_members" (
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each crew member */,
  "crew_name" TEXT /* Name of the crew member */,
  "crew_gender" TEXT /* Gender of the crew member */,
  "crew_birth_date" TEXT /* Date of birth of the crew member */,
  "crew_popularity" REAL /* Popularity score of the crew member */,
  "crew_biography" TEXT /* Biography of the crew member */,
  "crew_place_of_birth" TEXT /* Place of birth of the crew member */,
  "crew_profile_path" TEXT /* File path to the crew member's profile picture */,
  "crew_department" TEXT /* Department of the crew member */,
  "crew_job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_crew" (
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "crew_id" INTEGER /* ID of the crew member */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department the crew member belongs to */,
  "job" TEXT /* Job title of the crew member */,
  "credit_id" TEXT /* Credit ID of the crew member */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("movie_id", "crew_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., producer, marketer, data analyst) */,
  "password" TEXT /* Password of the user */,
  "last_login" TEXT /* Timestamp of the user's last login */,
  "date_joined" TEXT /* Timestamp when the user joined */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the movie */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the movie was accessed */,
  "access_type" TEXT /* Type of access (e.g., view, download) */,
  "access_device" TEXT /* Device used for accessing the movie */,
  "access_location" TEXT /* Location where the movie was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reviews" (
  "review_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each review */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie being reviewed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user writing the review */,
  "review_text" TEXT /* Text of the review */,
  "review_rating" REAL /* Rating given by the user */,
  "review_date" TEXT /* Date when the review was written */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("review_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reviews_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "box_office" (
  "box_office_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each box office entry */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "box_office_date" TEXT /* Date of the box office entry */,
  "box_office_revenue" INTEGER /* Revenue generated by the movie on that date */,
  "box_office_rank" INTEGER /* Rank of the movie on that date */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("box_office_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_box_office_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "movie_versions" (
  "version_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each version */,
  "movie_id" INTEGER /* ID of the movie */,
  "version_name" TEXT /* Name of the version */,
  "version_description" TEXT /* Description of the version */,
  "version_release_date" TEXT /* Release date of the version */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("version_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_movie_versions_movie_id FOREIGN KEY ("movie_id") REFERENCES movies ("movie_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "version_changes" (
  "change_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each change */,
  "version_id" INTEGER /* ID of the version */,
  "change_date" TEXT /* Date when the change was made */,
  "change_description" TEXT /* Description of the change */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("change_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_version_changes_version_id FOREIGN KEY ("version_id") REFERENCES movie_versions ("version_id")
)
